title: Lietuviski svingeriai
overview: Sima and Giedre feel that their sexual life is similar to the buckwheat diet. But one evening they suddenly find themselves in bed with another woman. Giedrė after this adventure remains easily confused, and Simui is completely twisted in the head ... The man puts the cart and speaks his wife to sleep with a pair of swingers. Only the swingers themselves and the party in their luxurious home will not be as everyone expected

trailers.title: LITHUANIAN SWINGERS (2018) A new comedy by Tadas Vidmantas
